⚠️ **IMPORTANT: Do not report security vulnerabilities publicly.**

For security vulnerabilities, please email us directly at: **security@kayad.space**

## Security Issue Description

Please describe the security vulnerability you've found.

## Impact

Describe the potential impact of this vulnerability.

## Affected Components

- [ ] Frontend (www.kayad.space)
- [ ] Backend API (api.kayad.space)
- [ ] Database
- [ ] Third-party integrations
- [ ] Other: _______

## Steps to Reproduce

If safe to share, describe how to reproduce the vulnerability.

## Proof of Concept

If applicable, provide a proof of concept (POC) demonstrating the vulnerability.

## Suggested Fix

If you have a suggested fix, please describe it.

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the security vulnerability.

**Thank you for helping keep KAYAD secure!**
